spec: SPEC §5 synthetic/adversarial-state L0≡prod differential (state-injected, broad 'all situation')
method: random LEGAL states (pred + N boids, N∈{0..200} incl. out-of-domain positions) with persistent state {target,frame∈0..16,egBoid index,configured} sampled JOINTLY and injected IDENTICALLY into prod + L0 via __cheapDebug.set; force compared bitwise.
finding: L0 ≡ prod bitwise on 132k synthetic/adversarial legal states beyond the reachable game manifold (extreme N, boundary positions, adversarial injected persistent state, pre-configure path). Hardens the T1-by-construction claim against the broad 'all situation' reading and validates the §2a state-injection convention end-to-end (the path the student sealed-verdict uses).
